title: Native Android text sharing in Unity
summary: This particular script will help you to implement native Android text sharing in Unity. We use all the native classes of Android in Unity using AndroidJavaClass and AndroidJavaObject and perform the Android’s ACTION_SEND with EXTRA_SUBJECT and EXTRA_TEXT .
content:
This particular script will help you to implement native Android text sharing in Unity.

We use all the native classes of Android in Unity using AndroidJavaClass and AndroidJavaObject and perform the Android’s ACTION_SEND with EXTRA_SUBJECT and EXTRA_TEXT.
